Zhao Zhi и¶ҷзҘ—
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Zhi (и¶ҷзҘ—). Attracted disenchanted people and formed an army with them. Zhao Zhi was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Zhao Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
